author: y4rr
content: Decision: Fixture strategy for init statistical tests — generating N independent [fan_out, fan_in] params (500 trials) rather than one large param. A large single param changes fan_in/fan_out (compute_fans uses shape dims), which changes expected_std. 500 independent small params preserve the fan values while accumulating enough samples for a reliable std estimate. 10% relative tolerance is sufficient at that sample count.
